scripts.generate: buf generate && mv gen/google-protobuf/benchmark_pb.js gen/google-protobuf/benchmark_pb.cjs && mkdir -p gen/protobufjs && pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -o gen/protobufjs/benchmark.cjs proto/benchmark.proto && pbts -o gen/protobufjs/benchmark.d.cts gen/protobufjs/benchmark.cjs && pbjs -t json -o gen/protobufjs/benchmark.json proto/benchmark.proto
scripts.bench: pnpm generate && pnpm build && pnpm benchmark
